context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified roster section fully tested. Key findings: 1) 'Today's Priorities' section removed successfully - no longer exists on dashboard. 2) 'My Roster' section removed - replaced by 'Athletes Requiring Attention'. 3) RosterSection component uses data-testid='roster-section'. 4) Athletes split into needsAction (category != null) and onTrack (category == null). 5) On Track toggle uses data-testid='on-track-toggle' and is collapsed by default. 6) 5 athletes requiring attention: Emma Chen (momentum_drop), Sarah Martinez (momentum_drop), Olivia Anderson (blocker), Ava Davis (engagement_drop), Isabella Wilson (engagement_drop). 7) 1 on track athlete: Sophia Garcia. 8) Each row shows: name, issue badge, why reason, NEXT: action text. 9) Open Pod buttons use data-testid='open-pod-{athlete_id}' and navigate to /support-pods/{athlete_id}. 10) Review Priorities button scrolls to roster section. 11) Backend /api/mission-control returns myRoster with category, why, next_step fields.
